repo.description: This repository allows you to get started with training a state-of-the-art Deep Learning model with little to no configuration needed!  You provide your labeled dataset or label your dataset using our BMW-LabelTool-Lite and you can start the training right away and monitor it in many different ways like TensorBoard or a custom REST API and GUI. NoCode training with YOLOv4 and YOLOV3 has never been so easy.
